title: MS SQL Rationalization Reference-Data Pattern Library Schema
description: JSON Schema for the canon-blessed reference-data pattern library used by Phase 2 IDENTICAL-REFERENCE-DATA detection in the MS SQL Estate Rationalization Process. Each pattern declares an expected row-count window, a representative schema fingerprint, and the authoritative external source. Phase 2 overlap detection hashes the candidate reference tables and matches them against this library.

schema_fingerprint.description: The minimum column set the pattern requires. Additional columns permitted but don't participate in the fingerprint match.

reference_content_hash.description: Optional SHA-256 hash of a canonical serialization of the authoritative reference content. Lowercase hex, no separators (64 chars).

reference_url.description: Pointer to the authoritative external source (e.g., ISO standards URL).

source_authority.description: The agency or external body that owns the canonical content.

reference_version.description: Version pin of the authoritative external source (e.g., ISO 3166-1:2020).
